message:
feat(engine): add 222 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Twelfth batch of enrichment tests:

- observability_probe_design: 33 tests (optimizer edge cases, budget
  exhaustion, multi-mode manifests, certificate headroom, ledger)
- one_lever_policy: 37 tests (path classification, multi-lever
  overrides, evidence validation, scoring boundaries, audit trails)
- opportunity_matrix: 38 tests (hotpath weights, zero-denominator
  safety, historical tracking, benchmark pressure, candidate limits)
- optimal_stopping: 58 tests (CUSUM charts, Gittins indices, Snell
  envelopes, secretary problems, escalation policies, certificates)
- oracle_release_gate: 56 tests (threshold directions, gate verdicts,
  report integrity, triage severity, end-to-end pipelines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
